subcodes.first_line: This Book hath been sent down in truth from the presence of One All-Knowing, All-Informed, and biddeth all unto that which shall profit them. Blessed is he who followeth that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدن عالم خبیر و یامر الکل بما هو خیر لهم طوبی لمن یتبع بما
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
